title: alchemilla vulgaris f. flabellata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris f. flabellata, also known as the Lady's Mantle, is a cultivar of the Alchemilla mollis plant that exhibits unique, fan-shaped leaves. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which can help to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems. The health benefits of Lady's Mantle include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, soothe digestive upset, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla vulgaris f. flabellata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
